title: galium sylvaticum subsp. aristatum
intro: Galium sylvaticum subsp. aristatum, also known as aristate woodruff or woodruff, is a subspecies of the Galium sylvaticum plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Galium sylvaticum subsp. aristatum have been attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds like coumarin, a naturally occurring fragrance with antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help with stress relief, improve digestion, and reduce fever, among other uses. Galium sylvaticum subsp. aristatum can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture for its medicinal and health benefits, with some also using its essential oils in aromatherapy and perfumery applications.
